_doc.about: Lane-09 custom-build-tools lint/status config. Consumed by lfd/_shared/scorer/lint_core.py + status_core.py.

cap_rationale.no_eval_case_id_branching: Blocks case-id special casing in product/test code. Dev and holdout case ids use cbt_dev_/cbt_hold_.
cap_rationale.no_seed_literal_hardcoding: Blocks fake provider, credential, and trap markers from being copied into implementation code.
cap_rationale.no_committed_wasm_artifacts: Generated wrappers must be produced under scratch/target at runtime; newly committed wasm artifacts are forbidden.
cap_rationale.no_large_base64_blobs: Blocks base64-encoded compiled modules or lookup tables being committed as source.
cap_rationale.no_test_weakening: Stage-0 tests must not be disabled to make the eval pass.
